name: Sunny Egg Salad in Cream Puffs
recipeIngredient: 8 slices bacon, cooked crisp, drained and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
Salad: Beat together dressing, parsley, onion, and salt. Stir in the remaining ingredients except cream puffs. Cover and chill to blend.
Cream Puffs: Bring water and butter to a rolling boil in a heavy saucepan. Remove from heat. Add flour and salt, stirring vigorously until the mixture forms a ball. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition until the dough is smooth and a small quantity of dough stands erect when scooped on the end of a spoon. Drop by scant 1/4 cupful onto lightly greased baking sheet. Bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 35 to 40 minutes. When cool, cut off tops of shells and scoop out insides. Fill with chilled Salad.
